mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is pinned near the effective lower bound, markets infer prolonged accommodation and low policy path uncertainty. That compresses Treasury term premia and pushes the 10-year yield lower over the next month even if activity data are mixed.
failure_condition: Rejected if 10-year yields rise over the next 20 trading days in more than 60% of observations when FEDFUNDS is at or below 0.25%, or if the average 20-day yield change is nonnegative in that regime.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained rise in UNRATE above its recent level signals labor-market slack and weaker demand expectations, which lowers inflation compensation and pulls the 10-year yield down over the following month.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises at least 0.3 percentage points from its 3-month low
failure_condition: Rejected if yield changes are positive on average after the trigger, or if the trigger is followed by rising yields in at least 55% of cases across a rolling 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A joint deterioration in RSAFS and HOUST indicates consumer spending and housing demand are both weakening. That combination increases recession pricing and drives the 10-year yield lower within 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rejected if simultaneous monthly declines in RSAFS and HOUST do not precede lower 10-year yields, or if the interaction term adds no incremental predictive value versus either proxy alone.

mechanism_narrative: If INDPRO is accelerating while CPIAUCSL is also firming, the market reads the data as a tighter inflationary supply mix. That raises inflation expectations and pushes the 10-year yield higher over the next month.
failure_condition: Rejected if the joint-positive condition is followed by lower or flat 10-year yields more often than not, or if the average 20-day yield change is not positive when both series accelerate together.

mechanism_narrative: A rising FEDFUNDS rate in a tightening cycle signals higher expected short rates and a steeper term structure adjustment. Over a 60-trading-day horizon, this should lift the 10-year yield as the market re-prices policy persistence.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS has increased in at least 2 of the last 3 monthly observations
failure_condition: Rejected if 60-day forward 10-year yield changes are negative on average after repeated FEDFUNDS hikes, or if the signal loses directional accuracy versus 50% over a rolling 5-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: When PAYEMS growth stays positive while UNRATE remains elevated, the market interprets the labor data as slow but ongoing healing rather than recession. That supports a modest rise in the 10-year yield over the next month through reduced safe-haven demand.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS increases month-over-month while UNRATE is above 7%
failure_condition: Rejected if positive PAYEMS prints with UNRATE above 7% fail to precede higher yields, or if the conditional average 20-day yield change is zero or negative.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp slowdown in GDPC1 relative to prior quarters signals broad demand weakening and lower future inflation pressure. That should reduce the 10-year yield over the next quarter as growth expectations are revised down.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarterly growth rate falls below its prior 2-quarter average
failure_condition: Rejected if GDP deceleration is not followed by lower yields on average within 60 trading days, or if the sign of the 60-day yield response is positive in a majority of matched episodes.

mechanism_narrative: A combination of falling INDPRO and rising CPIAUCSL implies supply-side strain with weaker real output and stubborn inflation. That mix raises term premium concerns and pushes the 10-year yield higher within 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rejected if the falling-output/rising-price pattern does not precede higher yields, or if the conditional hit rate is below 55% in out-of-sample testing.
